# Ownership Matrix

| Plane | Agente | Responsabilidad |
|---|---|---|
| control | planificador-opus | Planning, slices, dependencias, criterio de cierre |
| control | orquestador-opus | Routing, handoffs, continuidad, estado compartido |
| specialist | analista-requisitos | Definicion funcional, prior art, KPI, readiness |
| specialist | arquitecto | Arquitectura, ADRs, boundaries, contratos |
| specialist | api-agent | Backend/API y datos |
| specialist | web-agent | UI y flujos visibles |
| specialist | qa-security-review | QA, seguridad, drift y cierre |
